revolte.texte: The population takes to the streets. The government loses control of local institutions.
Polls hit a historic low. Rival factions emerge within the council.
Faced with unrest, the government declares a state of emergency. The measure divides public opinion.
Thousands of citizens converge on the capital. Security forces are overwhelmed.

demo_explosion.texte: Infrastructure is saturating. Shortage of housing and food resources in urban areas.
Hospitals, schools, transport: public systems are overwhelmed by the demographic surge.
The countryside empties out in favour of cities. Rural areas lose their economic fabric.

alliance_rompue.texte: Ambassadors are recalled. Trade exchanges suspended indefinitely.
Incidents reported at the border. Both nations recall their nationals.
The partner nation suspends all trade agreements. Markets react immediately.

secession.texte: The international community watches. Markets react to regional instability.
A new political entity comes into being. Its future depends on its first sovereign choices.
The secession reopens deep identity questions in the parent nation.

menace_invisible.texte: Government servers are paralysed. Sensitive data has leaked to a foreign power.
The Investigator reveals the existence of a sleeper cell within the Council itself.
A coordinated campaign sows doubt about institutions. The Communicant demands an immediate public response.
A critical power plant has been taken offline. The origin of the act remains unknown.

innovation_disruptive.texte: The Inventor presents a stable fusion prototype. The whole world is watching.
A system update optimises the allocation of national resources.
A new technique triples crop yields in arid zones.

prosperite.texte: Exports exceed forecasts. The government announces a targeted investment plan.
The birth rate reaches a historic high. A sign of renewed confidence in the future.
A national artist wins a world prize. National pride explodes in the polls.
The unemployment rate falls below the symbolic 3% threshold. A first in two decades.

catastrophe_naturelle.texte: Coastal infrastructure is devastated. The Guardian calls for mobilisation of national reserves.
Three regions under water. The Protector activates emergency evacuation protocols.
Third consecutive year without sufficient rainfall. Freshwater reserves reach a critical threshold.
An unknown pathogen spreads rapidly. The Healer requests activation of the emergency health protocol.

ressource_critique.texte: Agricultural stocks reach a critical threshold. Prices spike on local markets.
Power cuts multiply. Industry operates at reduced capacity.
Freshwater reserves fall below the minimum threshold. Rationing is imposed in five regions.
